text: The umbrella shall be a web-based menu system allowing the user to choose between the games.
The program shall require a web browser capable of running Flash movies.
The product shall include an introductory movie to set up the storyline.
The product shall provide an option to skip the introductory movie.
The product shall include a main menu including a brief help section.
The product shall present a series of multiple-choice fraction questions including arithmetic and equivalence.
The product shall provide a friendly robotic sidekick to assist with usability issues and hints.
The product shall provide an ending scene where the user score is calculated and ranked.
The product shall provide an option to quit the game or try again at the ending scene.
The product shall include a web-accessible component to allow an administrator to update fraction questions.
The question updater shall require a password for administrative access.
The product shall save administrator-defined custom questions in a file on the web server.
The product shall keep the user score as local data within the game.
The product shall accept user input via mouse clicks for choosing answer options and setting preferences.
The product shall produce sound and animation outputs through Flash movies to acknowledge answer success or failure.
The product shall run on an Internet-accessible computer with a web browser supporting JavaScript and Macromedia Flash 5.
The product shall open specified S2S products in a separate window through the Math Umbrella.
The main game movie size shall be between 1MB and 2MB.
The product shall use appropriate sub-scenes in the main Flash game to ensure maintainability.
